stemHtml: When CAVOK is used in a METAR, what are the visibility and cloud conditions?

options.a: Visibility 8 km+, no cloud below 3000 ft.
options.b: Visibility 5000 m+, no cloud below 1500 ft.
options.c: Visibility 10 km+, no cloud below 1500 ft.
options.d: Visibility 10 km+, no cloud below 5000 ft.
